svg.title: Airflow Weather ETL Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing daily weather ETL pipeline from Open-Meteo API through Airflow tasks to PostgreSQL and Power BI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the create_table task do in Airflow?')
sendPrompt('What does the fetch_weather task do?')
sendPrompt('What does the transform_weather task do?')
sendPrompt('What does the load_weather task do?')
sendPrompt('What is PostgreSQL used for in this project?')
sendPrompt('How is Power BI connected to PostgreSQL?')
